title: DISTRICT COURTS, PARISH OF ORLEANS
doc_html:
CHAPTER 5.  DISTRICT COURTS, PARISH OF ORLEANS

PART I.  GENERAL PROVISIONS

SUBPART A.  JUDGES

§1001.  Cross-references

The following provisions shall apply to all district judges of Orleans Parish: R.S. 13:10.2, R.S. 13:581, 13:582, 13:693, 13:696, and 13:697.  

Acts 1984, No. 538, §1.
